title: Remove comment history section above documents

requirements.summary: Remove the CommentHistorySection component that appears directly above the DocumentsSection in the CaseDetail page
acceptanceCriteria: The CommentHistorySection component is no longer rendered in the CaseDetail page layout
The DocumentsSection remains visible and functional
The activity timeline with history icon functionality remains intact and unaffected

file_operations.description: Remove the CommentHistorySection component import and its rendering from the page layout while preserving ActivitySection, ActivityTimeline, and DocumentsSection components
